prompt: Workplan: implement 'hex goal' CLI verb. Per ADR-2026-05-13-1500 section 3 — Codex/Hermes Ralph-loop primitive between 'hex chat' (single turn) and 'hex plan' (decomposed workplan). Subcommands: hex goal <text> (set + kick off first turn), hex goal status, hex goal pause, hex goal resume, hex goal clear. Persist goal state in STDB session_goal table (session_id PK, text, status, turns_used, budget). After every chat/SOP turn, aux-model judge returns JSON {done: bool, reason: string} over goal text + last assistant response. Fail-open on judge error. Turn budget 20 continuations (configurable goals.max_turns). Files: hex-cli/src/commands/goal.rs (new), spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/lib.rs (session_goal table + reducers), hex-nexus/src/orchestration/goal_judge.rs (new). Evidence: cargo test goal_judge, end-to-end test that 'hex goal' completes a multi-step task without operator re-prompting.
